step.title: Load test plan and identify frameworks
step.action: Read test plan and identify test types, frameworks, and execution requirements.
If architecture exists, load it for infrastructure context.

step.title: Design pipeline stages
step.action: Design pipeline stages: lint, unit, integration, e2e.
Define stage ordering, dependencies, and failure behavior.

step.title: Configure parallelization
step.action: Configure parallelization and test splitting strategy.
Determine optimal shard count based on test suite size and runner capacity.

step.title: Set up reporting and coverage
step.action: Set up test reporting format and coverage upload configuration.
Configure artifact collection for test results and screenshots.

step.title: Define quality gate thresholds
step.action: Define quality gate thresholds: coverage percentage, flake rate, max duration.
Configure branch protection rules tied to gate results.

step.title: Produce CI configuration plan
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with CI configuration details.
